'''gawuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphomyiid|nymphomyiid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphomyiid|nymphomyiid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gawuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gæwiwith || gæwiwij || gæwiwish || gæwiwi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gawuwuwuth || gawuwuwuj || gawuwuwush || gawuwuwu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gawuwuth || gawuwuj || gawuwush || gawuwu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gawufwufth || gawufwufj || gawufwufsh || gawufwuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gawuwuthu || gawuwuju || gawuwushu || gawuwuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || gawuwuth || gawuwuj || gawuwush || gawuwu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gawuwuthul || gawuwujul || gawuwushul || gawuwukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gawuwuuthuthu || gawuwuujuju || gawuwuushushu || gawuwuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || gawuwuthun || gawuwujun || gawuwushun || gawuwukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gawuwuthuoro || gawuwujuoro || gawuwushuoro || gawuwukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
